** Supporting Details **
Provide the following:
* Browser Version:
* BigScale Version (`docker inspect bigscale/panel:latest --format '{{ index .Config.Labels "org.opencontainers.image.version" }}'`):
* Any Browser Errors (`control+shift+i` in chrome to see)

**Describe the bug**
A clear and concise description of what the bug is. Screenshots if applicable
